ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { point_metrics_inserted: 0 as Number, point_metrics_skipped: 0 as Number, sleep_sessions_inserted: 0 as Number, sleep_sessions_skipped: 0 as Number, workouts_inserted: 0 as Number, workouts_skipped: 0 as Number, }

payload.workouts map (item) -> { activity_type: item.activity_type, source_device: item.source_device, start_time: item.start_time as DateTime {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssXXX"}, end_time: item.end_time as DateTime {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssXXX"}, duration: item.duration as Number, duration_unit: item.duration_unit, energy_burned: item.energy_burned default null, created_at: now()as DateTime {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX"} as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ssXXX"}, statistics: item.statistics map (stat) -> { metric_type: stat.metric_type, unit: stat.unit, sum_value: stat.sum_value default null, average_value: stat.average_value default null, minimum_value: stat.minimum_value default null, maximum_value: stat.maximum_value default null } }

logger.doc:name: Ingest Started
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { userId: vars.userId, point_metrics:sizeOf(vars.point_metrics), sleep_session:sizeOf(vars.sleep_sessions), workouts: sizeOf(vars.workouts) } import log --- log::buildLog("INFO","Ingest started",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

db:insert.doc:name: Insert Point Metrics Data
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO point_metrics (user_id, metric_type, value, unit, source_device, recorded_at, duration_seconds, created_at) VALUES (:user_id, :metric_type, :value, :unit, :source_device, :recorded_at, :duration_seconds, :created_at) ON CONFLICT (user_id, metric_type, source_device, recorded_at) DO NOTHING
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ user_id: vars.userId, metric_type: payload.metric_type, value: payload.value, unit: payload.unit, source_device: payload.source_device, recorded_at: payload.recorded_at, duration_seconds: payload.duration_seconds, created_at: payload.created_at }]

db:insert.doc:name: Insert Sleep Sessions Data
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO sleep_sessions (user_id, stage, start_time, end_time, source_device, duration_seconds, created_at) VALUES (:user_id, :stage, :start_time, :end_time, :source_device, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (:end_time::timestamp - :start_time::timestamp)), :created_at) ON CONFLICT (user_id, source_device, start_time, stage) DO NOTHING
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ user_id: vars.userId, stage: payload.stage, start_time: payload.start_time, end_time: payload.end_time, source_device: payload.source_device, created_at: payload.created_at }]

db:insert.doc:name: Insert Work Out Data
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO workouts (user_id, activity_type, start_time, end_time, source_device, duration, duration_unit, energy_burned, created_at) VALUES (:user_id, :activity_type, :start_time, :end_time, :source_device, :duration, :duration_unit, :energy_burned, :created_at) ON CONFLICT (user_id, source_device, start_time, end_time) DO NOTHING
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { user_id: vars.userId, activity_type: payload.activity_type, start_time: payload.start_time , end_time: payload.end_time , source_device: payload.source_device, duration: payload.duration , duration_unit: payload.duration_unit, energy_burned: payload.energy_burned, created_at: payload.created_at }]

db:select.doc:name: Select Id from Workouts
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id FROM workouts WHERE user_id = :user_id AND activity_type = :activity_type AND start_time = :start_time AND source_device = :source_device
db:select.db:input-parameters: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { user_id: vars.userId , activity_type: vars.currentWorkOut.activity_type, start_time: vars.currentWorkOut.start_time, source_device: vars.currentWorkOut.source_device }]

db:insert.doc:name: Insert WorkOut Statistics
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO workout_statistics (workout_id, metric_type, unit, sum_value, average_value, minimum_value, maximum_value) VALUES (:workout_id, :metric_type, :unit, :sum_value, :average_value, :minimum_value, :maximum_value) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { workout_id: vars.workoutId, metric_type: payload.metric_type, unit: payload.unit, sum_value: payload.sum_value, average_value: payload.average_value, minimum_value: payload.minimum_value, maximum_value: payload.maximum_value, }]

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { userId: vars.userId, results: vars.results } import log --- log::buildLog("INFO","Ingest complete",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { point_metrics_inserted: vars.results.point_metrics_inserted, point_metrics_skipped: vars.results.point_metrics_skipped, sleep_sessions_inserted: vars.results.sleep_sessions_inserted, sleep_sessions_skipped: vars.results.sleep_sessions_skipped, workouts_inserted: vars.results.workouts_inserted, workouts_skipped: vars.results.workouts_skipped }

logger.doc:name: Ingest failed
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json import log --- log::buildLog("ERROR","Ingest failed",error.description, vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-500", message: "Ingest failed — transaction rolled back. No data was written.", correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }

validation:is-false.doc:name: startDate and endDate must both be present
validation:is-false.expression: #[(vars.queryParams.startDate != null and vars.queryParams.endDate == null) or (vars.queryParams.endDate != null and vars.queryParams.startDate == null) ]
validation:is-false.message: startDate and endDate must both be provided together

validation:is-false.doc:name: startDate must be before endDate
validation:is-false.expression: #[vars.queryParams.startDate != null and vars.queryParams.endDate != null and vars.queryParams.startDate > vars.queryParams.endDate]

validation:is-false.doc:name: validate metric type
validation:is-false.message: metric_type cannot be combined with data types sleep_sessions or workouts

validation:is-false.doc:name: validate sleep_stage
validation:is-false.message: sleep_stage cannot be combined with data types sleep_sessions or workouts

validation:is-false.doc:name: validate activityType
validation:is-false.message: metric_type cannot be combined with data types sleep_sessions or point_metrics

validation:is-false.doc:name: Duration with startdate
validation:is-false.expression: #[vars.queryParams.duration != null and (vars.queryParams.startDate != null or vars.queryParams.endDate != null)]
validation:is-false.message: Cannot provide both duration and Start/End Date.

logger.doc:name: Validations Passed
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: "Query Param received is valid", userId: vars.userId } import log --- log::buildLog("INFO","Validation Successful",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

logger.doc:name: Invalid QueryParam
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage = { status: "Query Param received is invalid", userId: vars.userId } import log --- log::buildLog("ERROR","Validation Not Successful",logMessage,vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: "WEARABLE-400", message: error.description replace("\n") with (" and "), correlationId: correlationId, timestamp: now(), originLayer: "system" }
